description.p: Your patron is a being that observes reality through an unseen lattice of sigils scattered across existence. It does not crave souls, devotion, or chaos—it seeks only knowledge. Through you, it expands its ever-growing network of perception. Truth is not given—it is taken.
Sovereign of Secrets lets you choose from an expanded list of spells when you learn a warlock spell. The following spells are added to the warlock spell list for you.
Your patron grants you awareness through unseen marks and sigils. If you have Detect Magic on your spell list, you can cast as ritual.
As a bonus action, you can mark a creature or object you can see within 60 feet with an invisible arcane sigil (no concentration required). For 1 hour:

ul.li: You always know the direction of the marked target while on the same plane.
You can hear faint echoes of sounds within 10 feet of the marked target (as if through a whisper).
You can have a number of active marks equal to your proficiency bonus.

description.p: Additionally, you gain proficiency in Investigation or Perception.

sheet.description:
You can cast Detect Magic as ritual. You have {{sigil:amount}} sigil that you can use. When you put sigil on a creature or a object:
You always know the direction of the marked target while on the same plane.
You can hear faint echoes of sounds within 10 feet of the marked target (as if through a whisper).

description.p: At 6th level, You can rip knowledge directly from others minds. When a creature marked by your arcane sigil you can see within 60 feet; Fails an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw, or is affected by your Detect Thoughts. You can use your reaction to extract a fragment of its mind, choose one from options below:

ul.li: Learn one of the creature’s resistances, vulnerabilities, or immunities. This option can be used only once per short rest.
Gain advantage on your next attack roll or saving throw against it.
Force it to take psychic damage equal to your warlock level.

description.p: You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1) per long rest.

sheet.description:
When a creature marked by your sigil fails a Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma saving throw or affected by your Detect Thoughts. You can use your reaction and choose one from these options:
Learn one of the creature’s resistances, vulnerabilities, or immunities. This option can be used only once per short rest.
Gain advantage on your next attack roll or saving throw against it.
Force it to take {{level:warlock}} Psychic damage.

description.p: At 10th level, You can no longer be observed without your permition. You are immune to being magically read, detected, or divined unless you allow it. When a creature attempts to read your thoughts or magically perceive you, you can use your reaction to choose one of these options:

ul.li: Deal 1d6 + charisma modifier psychic damage to it.
Force a Wisdom saving throw, On a failure: it is blinded until the end of your next turn.

sheet.description:
You are immune to being magically read, detected, or divined unless you allow it. If a creature tries to magically read, detect or divine you. You can use one of these options:
Deal 1d6 + {{charisma:modifier}} psychic damage to it.
Force a Wisdom saving throw, On a failure: it is blinded until the end of your next turn.
